# Ingantt Help — Deutsch

> Documentation for Ingantt, a project scheduling application.

## Erste Schritte

- [Überblick](https://help.ingantt.com/de/getting-started/overview/index.md)
- [Erste Schritte](https://help.ingantt.com/de/getting-started/getting-started/index.md)
- [Mit KI erstellen](https://help.ingantt.com/de/getting-started/create-with-ai/index.md)
- [Mit KI bearbeiten](https://help.ingantt.com/de/getting-started/edit-with-ai/index.md)
- [Import & Export](https://help.ingantt.com/de/getting-started/import-export/index.md)

## Projekt einrichten

- [Projekteigenschaften](https://help.ingantt.com/de/setting-up-project/project/index.md)
- [Kalender](https://help.ingantt.com/de/setting-up-project/calendars/index.md)

## Terminplan erstellen

- [Vorgänge](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/tasks/index.md)
- [Vorgangseigenschaften](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/task-properties/index.md)
- [Abhängigkeiten](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/dependencies/index.md)
- [Einschränkungen](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/constraints/index.md)
- [Ressourcen](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/resources/index.md)
- [Zuweisungen](https://help.ingantt.com/de/building-schedule/assignments/index.md)

- [Kritischer Pfad](https://help.ingantt.com/de/adjusting-schedule/critical-path/index.md)

- [Benutzerdefinierte Felder](https://help.ingantt.com/de/adjusting-schedule/custom-fields/index.md)
